description: Send email via SMTP (OCI Email Delivery or any relay) and read IMAP mailboxes.

tools.description: Send an email via SMTP. Use to send notifications, reports, or alerts, or to tell a person a flow needs their input. Recipients, subject, and body are provided at call time.

schema.name: to
schema.description: Recipient address(es). One address or a comma/semicolon-separated list.

schema.name: body
schema.description: Email body. Plain text by default.

schema.name: html
schema.description: Set true if the body is HTML.

schema.name: content_type
schema.description: Body content type. 'plain' for text, 'html' for HTML.

_confDescriptions.smtp_host: SMTP server hostname (e.g. smtp.email.us-ashburn-1.oci.oraclecloud.com for OCI Email Delivery).
_confDescriptions.smtp_port: SMTP server port. 587 for STARTTLS (default), 465 for SSL, 25 for plain.
_confDescriptions.smtp_username: (secret) SMTP auth username. OCI Console → Identity → Users → SMTP Credentials. Provide via secret store.
_confDescriptions.smtp_password: (secret) SMTP auth password — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.from_addr: Sender 'From' address. Must be a verified/approved sender on your SMTP relay.
_confDescriptions.use_starttls: If true, upgrade plaintext connection to TLS via STARTTLS (typical for port 587).
_confDescriptions.use_ssl: If true, use implicit SSL/TLS from the start (typical for port 465). Mutually exclusive with STARTTLS.
_confDescriptions.max_retries: Number of retry attempts on transient SMTP failures.
_confDescriptions.allowed_recipient_domains: Optional comma-separated allowlist of recipient domains (e.g. 'acme.com,partner.io'). Empty = no restriction.

tools.description: Fetch messages from an IMAP mailbox. Supports server (host/port/ssl), credentials, folder (default INBOX), filtering (last N messages, unread only, since date), and selectable per-message fields. Returns a structured envelope with messages, count, and folder.

schema.name: folder
schema.description: Mailbox folder to read. Defaults to INBOX.

schema.name: limit
schema.description: Maximum number of messages to return (capped server-side).

schema.name: unread_only
schema.description: If true, only return UNSEEN messages.

schema.name: since
schema.description: Only fetch messages on/after this date. Accepts ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD) or IMAP date (e.g. 01-Jan-2026).

schema.name: fields
schema.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include per message. Allowed: uid, from, to, subject, date, body_text, body_html, headers.

schema.name: mark_seen
schema.description: If true, mark fetched messages as Seen. Defaults false (peek).

_confDescriptions.imap_port: IMAP server port. 993 for SSL (default), 143 for plain/STARTTLS.
_confDescriptions.imap_username: (secret) IMAP login (usually the full email address). Provide via secret store.
_confDescriptions.imap_password: (secret) IMAP password or app-password — DO NOT commit. Provide via secret store at deploy time.
_confDescriptions.use_ssl: If true, use implicit SSL/TLS (typical for port 993).
_confDescriptions.max_messages: Hard cap on messages returned per call, regardless of requested limit.
_confDescriptions.max_body_bytes: Per-message body byte cap; longer bodies are truncated with truncated:true.
